title: Arid's Dimensional Resprites
description: A resource pack that fixes and updates textures in the Dimensional Doors mod.
body:
This is a small texture pack intended for use with the Dimensional Doors mod. It updates most of the used item sprites in the mod, as well as many of the blocks and armor sets. 

A few issues the base mod has with textures, such as the fluid flowing textures being 8x8 instead of 16x16, have been fixed with this pack as well.
